publicationstmt.publisher: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

profiledesc.creation: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2025-07-22 23:59:10 UTC.

change.item: This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)

repository.corpname: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections

did.abstract: Programs, menus, press releases, broadsides, videocassettes and photographs concerning Hotel Ezra Cornell.

defitem.label: Contact Information:
defitem.item: Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu

bioghist.head: ORGANIZATIONAL HISTORY
bioghist.p: Hotel Ezra Cornell is a student-run annual hotel-for-a-day program at the School of Hotel Administration. The first Hotel Ezra Cornell was staged in Prudence Risley Hall in 1926.

scopecontent.head: COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
scopecontent.p: Programs, menus, press releases, broadsides, videocassettes and photographs concerning Hotel Ezra Cornell.

emph.ref: Series I. Programs, Menus, Reports, Press Releases and other Administrative Records
Series III. Audio and Visual Materials
Series IV. Dinner Plates, Glassware and Memorabilia

prefercite.head: Cite As:
prefercite.p: Hotel Ezra Cornell records, #28-5-2328. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.

relatedmaterial.head: RELATED MATERIALS
relatedmaterial.p: See also Hotel School Video Collection, #28-11-3951 for many videos from Hotel Ezra Cornell. See also Cornell Hotel Association publications, #4699.

controlaccess.subject: Hotels.
Hotel management -- Study and teaching.
Hotel management schools.
controlaccess.corpname: Cornell University. School of Hotel Administration

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: A Toast to the Towns menu, Board of Director's Dinner menu

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Cornell Alumni News Magazine copy of article, the mystery of the stolen diamond artifacts: in room notice, pohot of winners accepting prize, story behind the winner's fake glasses/mustache

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Attendance folder, function flow timeline, program and menu

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Programs, program details, planning and programming materials, The HEC Report

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Recipe book made up of HEC's culinary and beverage team member's favorite recipes. Created and edited by the F and B and Marketing and Media teams.
